name: Deep Desert spice field caps
evidence: Shipped config contains per-map spice field caps.
Live DB materializes values in dune.spicefield_types.
Existing admin typed knob and Deep Desert docs validate before/after DB observation.
validationProcedure: Change Deep Desert medium/large caps on a lab stack, restart Deep Desert, then compare spicefield_types, spicefield_server_availability, and resourcefield_state.
rollbackProcedure: Restore backed-up UserGame.ini and restart Deep Desert.

name: Sandstorm buried treasure spawn rate candidate
evidence: Binary strings suggest a treasure spawn rate property.
No startup parse or runtime effect has been proven on the current build.
validationProcedure: Run a one-variable lab experiment with log signatures treasure|LootSpawn|SandstormTreasure|Buried and compare runtime observations.
rollbackProcedure: Restore backed-up UserGame.ini and restart affected map services.

name: Offline player partition move
evidence: Admin panel dry-run and confirmation-gated execution path are implemented.
Soft disconnect/teleport docs describe verification and rollback.
validationProcedure: Dry-run on an offline disposable player, execute with confirmation, then verify partition/map/dimension and relog behavior.
rollbackProcedure: Move the player back to the prior partition/location recorded in the audit result.

name: Native GM command envelope
evidence: Broker routing and delivery were observed, but native payload contract is not proven.
Docs identify player-controller/admin context as the likely missing contract.
validationProcedure: Capture a real in-game admin action and compare payload structure against known-good chat/director routes before probing PrintAllowedCommands.
rollbackProcedure: Do not execute mutating GM commands until PrintAllowedCommands returns through a proven path.
